title: Dashboard Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the Reporting Dashboard. All display data is loaded from this file.

title.description: Project title displayed in the header (24px bold)

subtitle.description: Subtitle displayed below the title (12px, gray)

backlogUrl.description: URL for the ADO Backlog link in the header

currentDate.description: Current date for the NOW indicator on the timeline (ISO 8601: YYYY-MM-DD)

timelineStartDate.description: Start date for the timeline X-axis (ISO 8601: YYYY-MM-DD)

timelineEndDate.description: End date for the timeline X-axis (ISO 8601: YYYY-MM-DD)

milestoneStreams.description: Horizontal milestone streams displayed on the timeline (1-5 streams)

label.description: Stream description displayed in the left sidebar

color.description: CSS hex color for the stream track line and labels

label.description: Text label displayed near the milestone marker (max ~20 chars recommended)

type.description: Marker type: checkpoint (circle), checkpoint-small (small dot), poc (amber diamond), production (green diamond)

position.description: Label placement relative to the track line

heatmapMonths.description: Month column headers for the heatmap grid (3-6 months)

currentMonth.description: The current month to highlight in the heatmap (must match one entry in heatmapMonths)

heatmapRows.description: Exactly 4 category rows: shipped, in-progress, carryover, blockers

category.description: Row category determining color and placement

items.description: Map of month name to array of work item strings (max ~10 per cell, ~40 chars each)
